response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified intro and outro talk segments based on visual cues. 2. Identified the performance segment of 'Caramel Pain' by Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei from 00:35 to 04:30. 3. Extracted metadata (song title, original composer DECO*27) from on-screen text. 4. Searched for official lyrics of 'Caramel Pain' by DECO*27. 5. Compiled the lyrics and generated the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting by Mori Calliope, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'Caramel Pain' by Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei, and concluding with a brief outro conversation.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and band members introduce the performance.
Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei perform the song 'Caramel Pain', accompanied by the band. The song's title and composer (DECO*27) are displayed on-screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I'm always lacking courage, so I can't cherish myself.
I won't notice unless I have a painful experience.
Ah, ah, it's Caramel Pain again today.
I can't just be a good girl, because the world is so colorful,
cloyingly sweet and bitter.
Ah, wait, my head hurts and I'm just drifting, 24/7.
It's impossible to suppress my barely-held emotions.
These days, I can't stay like this.
It's a little scary, but I'll leave them behind, leave them behind, leave them behind.
Even if the ideologies and styles I held until now break,
right now is fine, because I want to stay as I am forever.
Route? Mood? Who cares?
To the next, if I do more dangerous things, I win, right?
Whatever I have to sacrifice, it can't be helped.
From my bed, just hugging the pain in this chest.
Ah, ah, it's Caramel Pain again today.
Even if I dodge it like a mille-feuille, it'll be exposed someday.
It'll rot, it'll rot.
If I could have honestly told you it was painful,
maybe something would have changed by now.
The anime I like will disappear, and the person I like will disappear too.
That makes me lonely.
The important thing is just one thing.
So I don't have any more regrets, I'll live looking forward!
I'll leave them behind, leave them behind, leave them behind.
Even if the ideologies and styles I held until now get dirty,
I don't care, because I want to be in love with myself.
I love you, I love you, I love you.
Saying goodbye makes me tear up, but
whatever I have to sacrifice, it can't be helped.
From my bed, just hugging the pain in this chest.
Ah, ah, it's Caramel Pain again today.
Hey, I'm always lacking courage, so I can't cherish myself.
If it hurts, I'll just endure it a little.
Ah, ah, it's Caramel Pain again today.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei conclude the video with an outro discussion.
